Record Class StabilityDiagnostics.Snapshot

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
adris.altoclef.stability.StabilityDiagnostics.Snapshot
Enclosing class:
StabilityDiagnostics
public static record StabilityDiagnostics.Snapshot(boolean recordingEnabled, String taskChain, String baritoneProcess, String goal, String pathStatus, long millisSinceProgress, String recoveryStage, String inventoryReservations, String survivalOverride, String recentFailure, int repeatedTransitions, int stuckActivations, double pathCalculationsPerSecond, double tickMillis, double closeScanMillis, double asyncScanMillis, int asyncChunks, int closePositions, String cursorState, String screenType, double tickMedianMillis, double tickP95Millis, double scanMedianMillis, double scanP95Millis, int recordedSamples) extends Record

  • Constructor Details

    • Snapshot

      public Snapshot(boolean recordingEnabled, String taskChain, String baritoneProcess, String goal, String pathStatus, long millisSinceProgress, String recoveryStage, String inventoryReservations, String survivalOverride, String recentFailure, int repeatedTransitions, int stuckActivations, double pathCalculationsPerSecond, double tickMillis, double closeScanMillis, double asyncScanMillis, int asyncChunks, int closePositions, String cursorState, String screenType, double tickMedianMillis, double tickP95Millis, double scanMedianMillis, double scanP95Millis, int recordedSamples)
      Creates an instance of a Snapshot record class.
      Parameters:
      recordingEnabled - the value for the recordingEnabled record component
      taskChain - the value for the taskChain record component
      baritoneProcess - the value for the baritoneProcess record component
      goal - the value for the goal record component
      pathStatus - the value for the pathStatus record component
      millisSinceProgress - the value for the millisSinceProgress record component
      recoveryStage - the value for the recoveryStage record component
      inventoryReservations - the value for the inventoryReservations record component
      survivalOverride - the value for the survivalOverride record component
      recentFailure - the value for the recentFailure record component
      repeatedTransitions - the value for the repeatedTransitions record component
      stuckActivations - the value for the stuckActivations record component
      pathCalculationsPerSecond - the value for the pathCalculationsPerSecond record component
      tickMillis - the value for the tickMillis record component
      closeScanMillis - the value for the closeScanMillis record component
      asyncScanMillis - the value for the asyncScanMillis record component
      asyncChunks - the value for the asyncChunks record component
      closePositions - the value for the closePositions record component
      cursorState - the value for the cursorState record component
      screenType - the value for the screenType record component
      tickMedianMillis - the value for the tickMedianMillis record component
      tickP95Millis - the value for the tickP95Millis record component
      scanMedianMillis - the value for the scanMedianMillis record component
      scanP95Millis - the value for the scanP95Millis record component
      recordedSamples - the value for the recordedSamples record component

  • Method Details

    • conciseLines

      public List<String> conciseLines()

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
